overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player moves from covered walkways through blue-lit pedestrian corridors and open plazas, surrounded by towering skyscrapers, holographic billboards, and cyberpunk architecture with prominent teal and magenta lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under overpass with CHOOH2 advertisement

events.description: turning left to enter the blue-lit pedestrian corridor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the covered walkway, passing orange safety railings and large holographic billboards

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement for CHOOH2 fuel with stylized graphics mounted on the overpass
bright orange metal barriers lining the edge of the walkway
massive concrete pillars and beams forming the highway overpass above
rain-slicked concrete sidewalk reflecting the neon lights above

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a massive concrete overpass in a futuristic city. The player walks forward along a wet, reflective pavement lined with orange safety railings on the right, passing beneath a large CHOOH2 billboard. The environment is sheltered and empty of pedestrians, with mixed lighting from overhead fixtures and neon signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with blue glass facade

events.description: entering the blue-lit covered corridor with glass walls
exiting the corridor into the open plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking through the blue-lit corridor, passing pedestrians standing against the glass walls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing against the blue glass wall looking at a handheld device
pedestrian walking away from camera down the corridor toward the plaza exit

entered.detail: tall building exterior with reflective blue-tinted glass panels and vertical neon strips
long fluorescent tube lights running along the ceiling of the covered walkway
wide pedestrian path with drainage grates and concrete finish

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered pedestrian corridor illuminated by cool blue lighting from the glass building facade on the left. Sparse pedestrians are visible, some standing against the wall and others walking. The corridor leads toward an exit into a more open area, with the VOTE billboard becoming visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with towering skyscrapers and political billboards

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the towering skyscrapers and neon signs overhead
camera tilts back down to street level to continue walking

agents.ego_description: pausing in the plaza to look up at the towering skyscrapers and neon signs overhead, then returning to street level

notable_agents.action: pedestrian crossing the open plaza area
car parked along the curb with headlights illuminated

entered.detail: large political advertisement billboard with VOTE text and candidate image mounted on a building
massive futuristic high-rise buildings with illuminated windows and neon accents reaching into the night sky
tropical palm trees in concrete planters lining the plaza edge
multi-level highway overpass structure with glowing traffic lines running above the plaza

segments.scene_description: Exiting the corridor, the scene opens into a wide urban plaza surrounded by towering skyscrapers. The player looks up to admire the massive buildings and elevated highways overhead, with neon signs and the VOTE billboard visible. Moderate pedestrian traffic moves through the plaza, and palm trees add vegetation to the concrete environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with neon storefronts and overhead pedestrian walkways

events.description: red car passes by on the right side of the street
turning right to follow the curve of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the city street, passing rows of vending machines and neon-lit storefronts while following the road curve

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving past on the street with headlights on

entered.detail: row of illuminated vending machines with various advertisements and products visible through glass fronts
commercial buildings with bright neon signage and illuminated windows facing the street
enclosed pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street with glowing green directional signs
tall lampposts with bright white lights illuminating the street below

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a city street lined with vending machines on the left and neon storefronts on the right. Sparse traffic includes a red car passing by. The street curves gently, with an overhead pedestrian walkway spanning above. The environment transitions from the open plaza to a more enclosed street canyon with building facades close on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit street with prominent green spiral structure and elevated highways

events.description: passing under the large green spiral neon structure dominating the street view

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street toward the large green spiral neon sign, passing under elevated highway structures

entered.detail: massive cylindrical building feature with horizontal green neon rings creating a spiral effect against the night sky
vertical green neon sign reading ALL FOODS on the building facade
street sign indicating BARRETTO ST with directional arrows mounted on the overhead structure

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the player walking toward a distinctive green spiral neon structure that dominates the street view. The ALL FOODS sign and BARRETTO STREET signage are visible as the player passes under elevated highways. The street continues with neon-lit storefronts and occasional pedestrians, maintaining the dense cyberpunk urban atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered concrete underpass into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic city. It begins beneath a massive overpass on wet, reflective pavement lined with orange railings and a CHOOH2 billboard, before moving into a covered pedestrian corridor bathed in cool blue light. As the camera exits the corridor, the scene opens into a wide urban plaza where the view expands upward toward towering skyscrapers, elevated highways, and a prominent VOTE billboard. The movement then shifts from the open plaza into a more enclosed street canyon lined with vending machines and neon storefronts, passing a red car and an overhead walkway. Finally, the path leads toward a distinctive green spiral neon structure and the ALL FOODS signage, deepening the dense cyberpunk atmosphere under the shadow of the city's overhead infrastructure.
